name: Yuubou! | Adventurers
description:
The Brave Adventurers Have Departed!

Embark on a grand journey with your band of heroic adventurers! . . . . . .

At least, that's what the flyers all said. In reality, you find yourself in an

adventuring party of misfits with a dearth of experience. At least they're

pretty, though, right?

___________________________________________

The world setting includes some fetishization, mostly pertaining to the sexualization of body parts (big boobs/butts/bellies, etc.). One region has both slavery and slave uprisings, though nothing is detailed beyond the fact that slavery exists. If a particular region disturbs you, for any reason, simply reply, "On second thought, let's not go there. 'Tis a silly place," to depart.
creator: Lord Sinbad
